title: Box Packer
description: Box Packer / Chest Transporter for Vanilla Minecraft - Move your items as if you were using a "Shulker Box" or a "dolly" in a balanced way for the early game.
body:
# Box Packer: A Chest Transporter DataPack for Vanilla Minecraft – Simplify Your Inventory Management!
Looking for an easy and balanced way to transport your chests and barrels in Vanilla Minecraft? Introducing Box Packer, designed to enhance your gameplay experience with a simple yet powerful tool.
## What Does It Do?
The concept is straightforward:
- Craft you **Box Packer**!
- (Shift) Right-click a chest or barrel to pack it.
- Move it to your desired location.
- Unpack it with all the items intact!

It’s like a Shulker Box, but specifically designed for the early game. Unlike them, the Box Packer has durability, making it a balanced and practical solution for inventory management.

## Why Use This DataPack?
Minecraft players have long faced challenges with inventory management. This DataPack brings a widely loved modding community concept to Vanilla Minecraft, using only commands.
- Balanced Gameplay: Adds durability to the transporter, ensuring it’s not overpowered.
- Fun and Practical: Easily move your chests and barrels without losing items.
- Compatible with Other DataPacks: No conflicts (as far as I know!).

Trivia: This was my first Data Pack on early 2021, hope you enjoy it!
